title: AWS Certified SysOps Administrator Associate note
content:
Route53

  1. A record - root domain, forward domain/sub domain to IPv4 address
  2. Alias - route traffic to AWS resources, such as CloudFront, S3.
  3. CNAME - map one domain to another, but not root domaian.
  4. AAAA - IPv6

CloudFormation

  • StackSets - can deploy to ultiple accounts/regions with single operation
  • Changeset - upcoming changes
  • Nested stacks - reuse

title: Random thoughts 生活随想
content:
One

开始清理以前的东西，翻到自己曾经的日记，2012.10.9这天，我写下了想去国外读书，但是没钱没有好的成绩的顾虑。

I started to pack up my old things and opened my old diary. On October 9, 2012, I wrote down that I want to go to other coutry to study, but I had no money and no good grades.

现在回头来看，靠着在国内的积蓄和这边打工，已经读完研究生，找到了国外的男朋友，同时靠自己的努力找到了心仪对口的工作。真想对当时的自己说，过好当下，脚踏实地，你想要的都会慢慢实现的。

Looking back now, relying on my savings in China and working here, I have obtained a postgraduate degree, found a boyfriend abroad, and at the same time, I have found a corresponding job through my own efforts. I really want to say to myself at that time, live the moment well, keep your feet on the ground, and what you want will be realized slowly.

二则

学会把握每个当下，到最后我们往往会发现，正是那一个又一个当下的累积，圆满了我们的过去，成就了我们的未来。

Learn to grasp each moment, and in the end we often find that it is the accumulation of one moment after another that completes our past and fulfills our future.
